title: EEG Seizure Detection (PWDR)
sub_domain: Cortical electrical signal feature recovery from EEG with seizure / non-seizure categorical readout
source_data_quality_note: v2 PWDR Principle. Wraps L1-068 EEG (existing in v1 genesis) with deterministic seizure-detection rules per ILAE 2017 Operational Classification + AAN clinical neurophysiology guidelines to assign per-segment seizure label {non-seizure, seizure_focal, seizure_generalized, status_epilepticus} + onset-zone localization. Universal in epilepsy monitoring (EMU), ICU continuous EEG (cEEG), and neonatal monitoring. UTSW Department of Neurology Comprehensive Epilepsy Center.

gate_substitutions.conservation_substitute: softmax simplex closure on seizure categorical {non_seizure, focal_aware, focal_impaired_awareness, focal_to_bilateral_TC, generalized_TC, generalized_absence, status_epilepticus}

discrete_readout.threshold_function: Per-segment (typically 10-second window): seizure = step on (rhythmic_pattern_frequency_Hz, evolution_in_frequency_AND_amplitude_AND_morphology, duration_seconds, spatial_distribution): seizure_focal if rhythmic >5 Hz pattern with evolution lasting > 10 seconds in localized channels; generalized if pattern across all channels symmetrically; status_epilepticus if seizure lasting > 5 minutes OR > 2 seizures without recovery between. Per ILAE 2017 Operational Classification + Trinka 2015 status epilepticus definition.
discrete_readout.underlying_physical_state: EEG signal feature recovery: spectral content per channel, rhythmic pattern detection (continuous wavelet transform or short-time FFT), spatial coherence between channels, evolution of dominant frequency/amplitude over time — recovered from L1-068 EEG core
discrete_readout.threshold_continuity_proof: Spectral power and coherence are continuous on EEG features; class boundaries are step functions on dominant-frequency, evolution-duration, spatial-distribution. Smoothed-detection globally Lipschitz with constant ~0.05 per percentage-point of feature-recovery error.

related_principles: L1-068 (EEG — scalp electrostatic analytical core, physics_core_principle)
L1-067 (MEG — sibling magnetic neural modality, informational)
L1-507 (Joint MEG-EEG — sibling source-imaging multi-physics, n_c=2, informational)
L1-528 (ECG arrhythmia — sibling biopotential signal PWDR, informational)

E.description: EEG Seizure Detection (PWDR): wraps L1-068 EEG with ILAE 2017 + Trinka 2015 + AAN clinical neurophysiology rules. Stage 1 (analytical, from L1-068): from multi-channel scalp EEG (typically 19-256 channels per international 10-20 / 10-10 systems), recover per-channel spectral content (delta 0.5-4 Hz, theta 4-8 Hz, alpha 8-13 Hz, beta 13-30 Hz, gamma 30-80 Hz), spatial coherence patterns, evolution of dominant frequency/amplitude/morphology, artifact rejection (eye blinks, muscle, cardiac). Stage 2 (deterministic threshold): apply rhythmic-pattern + evolution + duration + spatial-distribution rules. Difficulty tier delta = 5.
E.forward_model: Stage 1 (L1-068): multi-channel EEG -> {spectral_power(channel, frequency, time), spatial_coherence, evolution_features, artifact_mask}. Stage 2: seizure_class = step(features per ILAE 2017 + Trinka 2015 thresholds).
E.world_state_x: Per-segment seizure label (type + duration + onset zone if focal); per-recording status epilepticus boolean.
E.observation_y: Multi-channel EEG: 19-256 channels at 256-2000 Hz sampling; durations 30 minutes to 7 days continuous monitoring.

G.dag: L.eeg_acquisition -> L.bandpass_filter -> L.artifact_rejection -> L.spectral_decomposition -> L.evolution_detection -> L.seizure_threshold_classifier -> int.temporal_spatial
coupling_constraints: spatial_temporal_features: spatial coherence + temporal evolution are jointly observed across channels and jointly determine seizure class via the ILAE rule (focal vs generalized, with-evolution vs without)

W.regime: Existence inherited from L1-068. Uniqueness conditional on adequate channel coverage + electrode impedance < 10 kohm. Stability dominated by muscle_artifact and drowsy_state_confounder (subclinical seizures). Joint Hadamard well-posedness established by Fisher 2017 (ILAE 2017 Operational Classification), Trinka 2015 (status epilepticus definition), Hirsch 2013 (ACNS critical-care EEG terminology), Roy 2019 (deep learning EEG seizure benchmark), Acharya 2018 (EEG seizure deep learning review).

C.solver_class: linear-operator + signal-processing [bandpass + ICA artifact rejection + STFT/wavelet] + categorical-readout [ILAE classifier] | end-to-end deep neural [SeizNet, SeizureNet, EEGNet]
C.error_bound: Inherits L1-068. Misclassification probability bound: Pr(seizure_hat != seizure_true) <= C * |feature_error| / d(features, ILAE_threshold).
C.complexity: O(N_channels * N_samples * log(N_samples)) for stage 1 STFT + O(N_segments * N_features) for stage 2

recast_attempted.recast_path: Original: 'Detect seizures in EEG'. Recast: 'Recover spectral + spatial + evolution features via L1-068; apply ILAE 2017 + Trinka 2015 rule-based seizure classifier'. Feasible because cortical electrical activity has well-defined Poisson-electrostatic forward model and seizure morphology rules are deterministic.

joint_well_posedness_references: Fisher RS et al. (2017) Operational classification of seizure types by the International League Against Epilepsy: Position Paper of the ILAE Commission for Classification and Terminology. Epilepsia 58(4):522-530.
Trinka E et al. (2015) A definition and classification of status epilepticus — Report of the ILAE Task Force on Classification of Status Epilepticus. Epilepsia 56(10):1515-1523.
Hirsch LJ et al. (2013) American Clinical Neurophysiology Society's standardized critical care EEG terminology. J Clin Neurophysiol 30(1):1-27.
Roy S et al. (2019) ChronoNet: a deep recurrent neural network for abnormal EEG identification. AIME 2019.
Acharya UR et al. (2018) Deep convolutional neural network for the automated detection and diagnosis of seizure using EEG signals. Comput Biol Med 100:270-278.
Shoeb AH (2009) Application of machine learning to epileptic seizure onset detection and treatment. PhD thesis, MIT (CHB-MIT scalp EEG database).

distinctness_audit.rationale: L1-068 EEG inverts scalp potential to recover neural source / cortical activity. L1-531 wraps with feature extraction + ILAE seizure classification. Different solution_space (1D seizure class per segment vs continuous source distribution); adds L.spectral_decomposition, L.evolution_detection, L.seizure_threshold_classifier primitives.

v3_metadata.clinical_context: Universal in epilepsy monitoring units (EMU), ICU continuous EEG (cEEG), and neonatal monitoring. ~50 million people globally have epilepsy. Status epilepticus is a neurological emergency with ~30-day mortality 15-20%. UTSW Comprehensive Epilepsy Center is a Level-4 epilepsy center. Commercial: Persyst (Persyst SeizureXpress), Natus NeuroWorks, BioSerenity, NeuroPace RNS (responsive neurostimulation with on-board seizure detection).
